title: Built an ML scanner that flagged BJDX at 1:30am before its 200%+ move today — here's exactly what it detected
author: ParsnipConscious7761
selftext:
Two days ago I posted about an ML scanner I built that detects low-float penny stocks before they explode. The feedback was good so I kept running it live.

  
[https://www.reddit.com/r/ai\_trading/comments/1tth7aa/built\_this\_for\_my\_own\_trading\_over\_the\_past\_month/?utm\_source=share&utm\_medium=web3x&utm\_name=web3xcss&utm\_term=1&utm\_content=share\_button](https://www.reddit.com/r/ai_trading/comments/1tth7aa/built_this_for_my_own_trading_over_the_past_month/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button)



**The track record so far — 2 trading days:**

Day 1 (May 31): Flagged MASK as Grade B, vol acceleration 5.5x, 20x ADV. Ran +52% that day.

Day 2 (June 2): Flagged BJDX at 1:30am as a MONSTER setup. Up 200%+ today.

**What the system showed for BJDX at 1:30am:**

    $BJDX — Grade A | MONSTER Conviction
    Price: $2.14 | Float: 1.03M shares | Mkt Cap: $2.2M
    
    Volume Building ✓
      25.6x ADV yesterday
      4.7x acceleration over 14-day window
      Accumulation signal detected
    
    Base Forming ✓
      9 days from 52-week low
      9 consecutive higher lows
      Range compressing — coiling for breakout
    
    Momentum ✓
      4 of last 5 days closed green
    
    Watch level: $2.22 (20-day resistance + 2%)
    Closest historical analog: CING ran +623%
      from similar setup

**How the scanner works:**

Built on 830 historical explosion events (100%+ moves in 5 days) from 2021-2026. XGBoost model trained on 14-day feature windows before each explosion. Two-layer output:

**Score (0-100):** ML similarity to historical explosion patterns

**Grade (A-D):** Real-time check — is volume actually building now? Base forming? Momentum bullish?

**MONSTER conviction:** Data-derived from comparing 160 historical 200%+ moves vs 670 smaller moves. MONSTER requires:

* Within 8 days of 52-week low
* Float 3-10M shares
* Sustained volume > 1x ADV
* Volume yesterday > 0.55x ADV
* Peak volume > 3.5x ADV

BJDX hit 4 of 5 conditions at 1:30am.

**Interesting thing about the ML score:**

BJDX scored only 43.9/100 on the ML model. MASK scored 41/100. Both ran huge. The model underscores same-day explosive setups because it's trained on 5-day returns — but the Grade A + MONSTER conviction filter catches them anyway.

The grade and conviction tier are doing more work than the raw ML score for same-day plays.

**What I'm watching tomorrow:**

Live watchlist updates every morning at 7:30am ET automatically. Today's Grade A/B setups after BJDX ran are on the site.

👉 [https://prefire-delta.vercel.app](https://prefire-delta.vercel.app)

Replay tab shows what the signal looked like 14 days before ELPW ran +1597% and SKK ran +617%.

**Honest caveats:**

Two data points is not a track record. I'm running forward tests automatically — every signal gets logged and reviewed after 5 trading days. Will post results in 2-3 weeks when there's enough data to be statistically meaningful.

The system flags 1-2 MONSTER setups per week on average. Most days it's Grade B setups which are lower conviction. Not every call will work — penny stocks are inherently noisy.

⚠️ Research tool only. Not financial advice. Low-float penny stocks carry extreme risk. Never trade more than you can afford to lose.

Questions on the methodology welcome in comments.

comments.author: Different-Scale5419
comments.body: Keep your predictions coming.  I’ve been making good gains on penny stocks

comments.author: lexiisnation
comments.body: Sería posible ver el código interno de esta herramienta?

comments.author: joe_ambiguity
comments.body:
I noticed that your B and C qualifiers do better than the A’s on your output - at least the last I looked.  I just found that interesting. 

Since you list so many and an output , to stack the odds of the big winner,  would you buy all of them?

replies.author: ParsnipConscious7761
replies.body: The list is there but I will limit myself to AI briefing section. Yes the list is there but that is for me to tell you what I am doing. It also has feedback loop where at the end of the day I can for top gainers and then compare with the list that I have and reason on why we missed them. This tool is jsut there to cut the noise.

comments.author: wado729
comments.body: Can you do this for options on non penny stocks?

replies.author: ParsnipConscious7761
replies.body: I think that can be done as well. The market capital and few variables would shift but similar  set up of multiple models grading and scoring price movement , that will impact options pricing but will have more noise because of greeks and IV.

comments.author: ma-ta-are-cratima
comments.body:
Cherry picked. 

Show the other 50% of stocks that it detected and in theory you bought and they did not grow and you got with the bag

replies.author: ParsnipConscious7761
replies.body:
This has all the stocks and the update time if you see. There are stocks as well. This is not traditional scanner. The data is there to be transparent and for self improving models. It also checks at end of day what signals it missed and find out what could have been done.  

The idea is to cut most noise and focus on AI Morning Briefing.
